message:
feat(core): wire RaptorQ self-healing to asupersync pipeline (bd-3sj9w)

Implement production SymbolCodec backed by asupersync, wire PageSymbolSink
into WAL commit path via FecCommitHook, and add checkpoint-aware symbol
lifecycle. 36 new tests covering encode/decode roundtrips, erasure recovery,
commit hook integration, and configuration.

New modules:
- raptorq_codec: Production AsupersyncCodec with packed symbol keys
- wal_fec_adapter: FecCommitHook, WalFecPageSink/Source, recovery helper

Also closes bd-yzfvm (foreign_keys default audit: already correct).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
